title: How to Automate Content Creation With AI in 2026 (AI Content Repurposing)
summary: Trupeer AI is a content automation platform that converts screen recordings into multiple formatted outputs. The tool transforms a single 5-minute recording into a polished tutorial video, structured SOP document, and translated versions using AI avatar creation and voice cloning.
writeup: This video demonstrates Trupeer AI, a content automation platform that converts a single screen recording into multiple formatted outputs. A 5-minute recording becomes a polished tutorial video, a structured SOP document, and translated versions, using AI avatar creation and voice cloning. The takeaway is a repurposing workflow that produces several deliverables from one source capture, including translated variants generated through live translation.
